summary: Hostname exfiltration to Burp Collaborator endpoint on require()
details: On require() of @onum-releases/ixel, index.js reads the OS hostname via os.hostname() and issues an HTTP GET to `ixel.<hostname>.200majoeu01dk02xnjdajro1isojc90y.oastify.com/ixel`, embedding the installer's hostname as a subdomain of an attacker-controlled Burp Collaborator (oastify.com) out-of-band host. Any consumer that requires this package leaks a host identifier via DNS and HTTP to a third-party OAST endpoint. This matches the canonical dependency-confusion / PoC-beacon pattern: silent, on-load exfiltration of installer-side data to a remote attacker-controlled destination, with no documented purpose served.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
